title: Deadly Attack on Oil Tankers Prompts Iraq to Close Oil Terminals
summary_full: An attack off the Iraqi coast engulfed two oil tankers in flames, killing at least one person. Senior Iraqi officials believe the attack was Iranian.
summary_public: An attack off the Iraqi coast engulfed two oil tankers in flames, killing at least one person. Senior Iraqi officials believe the attack was Iranian.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: Attack on Oil Tankers Prompts Iraq to Close Oil Terminals
